channel.title: Daily News Briefing
channel.description: Twice-daily audio news briefing covering AI, technology, global politics, and financial markets. Delivered every morning and afternoon at Taipei time.
channel.itunes:author: Daily News Briefing
channel.itunes:summary: Twice-daily audio news briefing covering AI, technology, global politics, and financial markets. Delivered every morning and afternoon at Taipei time.

item.title: Morning Briefing — April 11, 2026
item.description: Your morning news briefing for April 11, 2026. Covers AI, technology, global politics, and financial markets. Published at 8 AM Taipei time.
item.itunes:title: Morning Briefing — April 11, 2026

item.title: Afternoon Briefing — April 10, 2026
item.description: Your afternoon news briefing for April 10, 2026. Covers AI, technology, global politics, and financial markets. Published at 2 PM Taipei time.
item.itunes:title: Afternoon Briefing — April 10, 2026

item.title: Morning Briefing — April 10, 2026
item.description: Your morning news briefing for April 10, 2026. Covers AI, technology, global politics, and financial markets. Published at 8 AM Taipei time.
item.itunes:title: Morning Briefing — April 10, 2026

item.title: Afternoon Briefing — April 9, 2026
item.description: Your afternoon news briefing for April 9, 2026. Covers AI, technology, global politics, and financial markets. Published at 2 PM Taipei time.
item.itunes:title: Afternoon Briefing — April 9, 2026
